ksa_text: Knowledge of data quality and integrity assurance practices, including data quality frameworks and metrics, integrity validation approaches, anomaly detection and remediation, data cleansing procedures, and de-identification techniques.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: knowledge from Operations & Program Management (affinity 0.50); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). A Data Ethics Officer would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Ethics Officer whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
